title: Mashed Tangy Crunchy American Yam Paella
description: A tangy, crunchy twist on traditional paella featuring white yam, dashi-extract, and a variety of textures.

ingredients.name: dashi extract
ingredients.notes: use a neutral oil for frying
ingredients.name: extra virgin olive oil

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and saut1; for 3-4 minutes until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add dashi extract, smoked paprika, chili flakes, and crushed red pepper. Cook for 1 minute until the spices are fragrant.
Add chopped white yam and cook for 5-6 minutes until golden brown.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes until the yam is cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook crispy bacon bits in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Flake the cooked yam into large pieces and add to the paella pan.
Stir in chopped cilantro and crispy bacon bits.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
